case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1188 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.4934/2023 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.4935/2023 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 06.03.2025 None present for the petitioner nor any intimation is received. On 10.08.2023 Counsel for the petitioner was put on notice to satisfy the Court about maintainability of this petition. Thereafter no efforts were made to get the matter fixed in Court for hearing. The conduct of the petitioner and his Counsel reflects that they are not interested to proceed with the matter. Accordingly, instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
